options: :where() has ZERO specificity, :is() takes the highest specificity of its arg
questions.explanation: :where() is a great tool to write helpful defaults without fighting the cascade.

options: Register a custom property with a type, so it can be animated
questions.explanation: Otherwise CSS treats vars as strings and can't animate through them smoothly.
